description_long: This kiosk features a robust, angular structure with a matte black finish and subtle signs of wear, suggesting heavy use in an urban environment. The front is dominated by a built-in console with a retro-style monitor, a tactile keyboard, and two control panels, all highlighted in a pale green hue. The sides are solid and blocky, with no visible openings or windows, emphasizing security and durability. The rear panel displays a large, colorful emblem or graphic, adding a touch of visual interest to the otherwise utilitarian design. The top surface is flat and broad, suitable for supporting additional objects or equipment. Overall, the kiosk exudes a functional, industrial aesthetic with minimal decorative elements.
description: A sturdy, matte black kiosk with a built-in retro console, pale green controls, and a large graphic on the rear. Its blocky, industrial design is utilitarian and secure.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main console with a monitor, keyboard, and control panels, all set into a thick, angular desk structure.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the depth of the kiosk and the protruding monitor, with the keyboard and controls visible from the side.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights a large, colorful emblem or graphic on the back panel, with no visible access points or controls.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the solid, blocky side panel and the side profile of the console.
attribute_signage_type: printed graphic on rear panel; no visible text
attribute_roof_design: flat, solid top with no overhangs or decorative features
